properties.note: Disabled toilet (ask in station for access)
Accessed via steps in traffic island

properties.wheelchair:description:en: The wheelchair accessible toilet is located at street level, the non-disabled toilets are located down steps and are not wheelchair accessible

properties.name: Ockham Bites
properties.wheelchair:description: Padlocked SHUT when cafe is closed. Therefore rated RED until I am able to check internally. RADAR Key.

properties.description: "Pissoir" Numbers 1s only!

properties.wheelchair:description: Step-free to WC lobby from cafe and garden. via double manual doors. Difficult to return directly to cafe unless doors are held open

properties.name: Whitton Library toilets
properties.note: These toilets sometimes have racist graffiti inside.

properties.description: Platform 2
NB closed in winter. In 2023 they opened on the 1st March

properties.wheelchair:description: update Jan 2021. Accessible WC undergoing refurbishment - See wheelmap for latest photos

properties.description: Fee is 50p or 1 euro, coin operated turnstile, though turnstile isn't secure and no attendant is present at some times of day. Below street level - access from steps near river or steps to underground.
properties.name: CityLoos

properties.description: These toilets are marked as for “disabled and baby changing use only”. A RADAR key is required. Other toilets are available on Platform 1.
properties.name: Crystal Palace station ticket hall toilets
Alexandra Palace Toilets
properties.operator: Alexandra Park and Palace Charitable Trust

properties.name: Lewisham Shopping Centre
properties.wheelchair:description: Unisex Accessible toilets via RADAR key as well as (?inaccessible for wheelchair users) separate ladies / gents. NO Changing Places toilet.

properties.fee:note: The event day urinals are free.
properties.fixme: Trim position when Bing is updated. The immediate area has been changed since Bing, but this building is in the clear so should be visible when the imagery is updated.
properties.note: There is a secondary door on the South side for four, event day only, urinals. Looks architect designed.

properties.wheelchair:description: Via steps to separate Male and female toilet via passage off south side of court
Access by RADAR key. Step-free from dedicated Blue Badge spaces near Tesco entrance.

properties.description: Toilets opposite mainline platform 1, on main concourse level, and outside the ticket line.

properties.operator: Old Royal Naval College Visitor Centre

properties.description: To access these toilets, call a telephone number displayed on the wall of the building to ask for the code.
Platform 1 (Northbound)
Platform 4

properties.note: This is the ladies and disabled toilets and also unisex baby change.

properties.description: Two rooms: Nappy changing and Disabled toilet

properties.note: in the corner beyond boots, disabled loo is in slightly different place

properties.fixme: locate more exactly on platform 2, in relation to cafe.
properties.wheelchair:description: On platform 2, outside waiting room. RADAR Key, but toilet not yet checked.

properties.name: Bus Museum
properties.wheelchair:description: At far corner from entrance to Bus building, behind trolleybus. Building has ramped entrance, wide aisles and level floor.

properties.name: Jackson Shed
properties.wheelchair:description: Signposted entrance has narrow doorway. Wider access through Grand Prix exhibition area (via exit or entrance).

properties.description: Mall Level -1

properties.note: toilets happen to be upstairs, but are open to the public
Only marked "this facility is open when the station is staffed"

properties.description: Toilets opposite mainline platform 3, on main concourse level, and outside the ticket line. These are specificcally for disabled/wheelchair users.
Cathedral Toilets

properties.wheelchair:description: Accessible WC has sliding door with push button and red-cord emergency alarm. Separate Baby change room nearby
Changing places toilet with hoist etc. Push button operated sliding door

properties.description: Mall Level -1 Next To Hotel Chocolate at the end of the corridor opposite Robert Dyas
Just inside gates of train station.

Access via building lobby, or Byron fast food restaurant. Step free route to accessible toilet is ground floor via Byron only, otherwise 3 steps via hotel lobby. Other toilets up flight of stairs on level 1
Open when station is staffed. On Platform 1.
Single toilet inside gateline
Toilets inside the shopping centre
Mall level -1 Next To Seoul Bird
properties.name: Jubilee Place Toilets

properties.description: Single wheelchair accessible toilet
Mall level -3. Access via door between Notes and Sticks n Sushi then lift.
properties.name: Crossrail Place Toilets

properties.operator:type: st martin in the fields ltd

properties.description: Inside the Waitrose & Partners Addlestone superstore.

properties.wheelchair:description: Step-free from Blackfriars Bridge/Queen Victoria Street via station concourse. Between WH Smith and lift to Thameslink Platform 1

properties.source: VSurvey by Steve from the Coalition
properties.wheelchair:description: Signposted from Clock Court gateway. Separate Accessible WC with wide turning circle wash basin etc.
Accessible WC is step-free via outward opening door but cramped and with cluttered floor (6/25) Separate Ramp to Female WC, but Step to Male WC

properties.description: At this entrance to Platform 5.
Women only. Men's toilets are next to Platform 5 (customers only).
Changing Places Toilet - "[...] for people with multiple disabilities who are accompanied by one or more assistants."
Women toilet
Accessible toilet
retail customers only, PIN code required from shop. Down stairs to either side of concourse
Toilet for bus drivers
